content.en:
"Spear of the Hell Divine Sky!"

Ye Tian urged this spatial great divine power and blasted towards the chaotic mammoth that was rushing over.

The space of the Xiaocheng realm is terrifying, how terrifying the power is, even if Ye Tian is only a true god-level cultivator, and this chaotic mammoth is a great god-level peak cultivator, but Ye Tian's combat power is enough to cross a great realm.

Poof!!!

The Hell's Divine Sky Spear penetrated into the body of the Chaos Mammoth, and immediately exploded, shattering the countless cells and vitality in the Chaos Beast's body.

Bang!

The Chaotian Mammoth fell, and his vitality gradually passed, and he was killed by Ye Tian in one blow.

Taking advantage of the moment when this chaotic mammoth died, Ye Tian stepped on the other party's corpse and rushed over.

At this time, the other chaotic mammoths also rushed over, trying to intercept Ye Tian.

Ye Tian used his spatial power to try to narrow the distance and stop the attack of these chaotic mammoths, and at the same time, he also continued to use his time talent to exert the ability of time stasis.

Under Ye Tian's various methods, many chaotic mammoths couldn't even get close to Ye Tian at all.

Finally, Ye Tian broke out of the encirclement of the Chaotian Mammoth Clan and successfully rushed out.

But at this time, Ye Tian found that there was another person behind him-

Li Xin'er!

At this time, Li Xin'er's white clothes were fluttering, like a fairy, and she didn't feel messy at all, obviously in the process of breaking out of the encirclement just now, she was very relaxed.

Swish!

Li Xin'er flew to Ye Tian's side and said, "His Highness Wanfa, is it convenient to be together?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Li Xin'er must know a lot more about the chaotic small world than him, so he didn't believe that the news Li Xin'er had revealed to him before was all.

Therefore, it may be better to follow Li Xin'er.

The two of them concealed their breath and kept flying.

Along.

Li Xin'er was full of praise for Ye Tian: "Before, I heard that His Highness Wanfa is the first genius of the universe and crushes the world's ten thousand races. I thought it was a bit exaggerated before, but just now I saw His Highness Wanfa kill a chaotic creature at the peak of the great god level in one move, and the rumors are indeed true. "

"Fairy Xin'er praised it, my strength is far from enough!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

Immediately, Ye Tian asked, "Fairy Xin'er, where should we go next?"

Li Xin'er was silent for a while, and said, "Your Highness Wanfa, I won't hide it from you, I do know information that others don't know." There is a place that may have a great opportunity. The strength of other people is average, although you are only a true god-level cultivator, but your strength is very strong, and you have god-level space talent and god-level time talent, you may also need to rely on your time talent and space talent. "

Under Li Xin'er's narration, Ye Tian had an understanding of that place.

It turned out that the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain had not only released a batch of puppets in, but several batches, several of which were top-notch puppets comparable to the demonic god-level powerhouses, and they had independent consciousness.

These puppets entered the small world of chaos and found many treasures and intelligence, including the place that Li Xin'er said, which was named Giant Wolf Mountain by the Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain.

There was a wolf-like chaotic creature corpse on Giant Wolf Mountain, and the coercion shocked the entire Giant Wolf Mountain and the surrounding area.

According to the investigation, this giant wolf should be a chaotic creature at the level of a cosmic god, but it is a pity that the small world of chaos was swallowed into the universe, and it could not resist the power of the origin of the universe and was directly wiped out.

There is an ancient well on the Giant Wolf Mountain, and there is a crystal clear silver liquid substance on the ancient well, which seems to be a good thing, but it is occupied by a silver wolf.

It is very likely that this silver is a descendant of the cosmic god giant wolf, and it was only because of his cultivation that he was at the peak of the great god level that he survived.

When the puppet entered the Giant Wolf Mountain, it saw many chaotic creatures besieging the silver wolf, but they were killed one by one.

The strength of that silver wolf was terrifying to the extreme, and even the puppet was discovered and killed in one move.

If it weren't for the fact that the silver wolf didn't know about the puppet, it wouldn't have allowed the puppet's core to escape and send the information out.

"Your Highness Wanfa, according to the intelligence, the combat power of that silver wolf should be equivalent to a first-grade Great God-level powerhouse at the level of His Highness the Eternal Ancient Level. My strength is only equivalent to the third-grade Eternal Highness, if I come into contact with some secret treasures, I can temporarily have the strength of the second-grade Eternal Highness, but I am still not the opponent of that silver wolf. "

Li Xin'er said.

"Fairy Xin'er, my cultivation is really god-level, and I am not the opponent of that silver wolf!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

He had estimated his strength, at most, he could only compete with the great god level of the third-grade Eternal Ancient Highness level, that is, it was about the same strength as Li Xin'er, if Li Xin'er used some secret treasures, he might not be an opponent.

After all, when there is a big difference in realm, it is too difficult to make up for the gap in strength.

"His Highness Wanfa has the talent of time and can cast the Blade of Time, as far as we know, that silver wolf is not young, if His Highness Wanfa keeps using the Blade of Time to erase the life of the opponent, there may be hope to kill the opponent. I'm in charge of containing the other party, and trying to give His Highness Wanfa enough time for you to cast the blade of time!" Li Xin'er proposed.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

When it comes to life-saving means, he is not weak to anyone.

Even if there was an accident, he was still sure to escape.

Immediately, Ye Tian and Li Xin'er rushed to Giant Wolf Mountain.

It didn't take long for the two of them to come to the area where Giant Wolf Mountain was located.

At this time, Ye Tian had already sensed the breath of the Cosmic God Giant Wolf, and the whole person was slightly depressed.

After another moment.

Ye Tian finally saw the cosmic god giant wolf.

This giant wolf is silvery-white, with faint golden hair on its eyebrows, and its size is very large, about thirty miles long, and its power is far beyond that of ordinary cosmic gods.

Ye Tian believed that its strength was enough to rival the most rebellious cosmic god of the universe god, because its physical body was really powerful, far surpassing all the gods of this universe.

The two kept getting closer, and kept converging their breath.

Soon, Ye Tian was not too far away from the giant wolf corpse.

At this time, he used the copy talent to check the talent of the giant wolf.

Talent Identification
Species: Golden Glowing Silver Wolf
Bloodline Talent: Chao Level
Strength Talent: God
Speed Talent: God-level
Defense Talent: God-level
Claw Talent: No superior
Golden Light Talent: God-level

......

"This golden and silver wolf has a very good talent!"

Ye Tian secretly commented.

He looked at it and forgot that the giant wolf mountain was full of the corpses of some chaotic creatures, including some very powerful god-level peak chaotic creatures.

Li Xin'er saw the corpses of these chaotic creatures and waved her hand to collect them into the space treasures.

"Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain needs to study some chaos creatures, so bring some back!"

Li Xin'er said.

Seeing this, Ye Tian also collected some chaos creatures.

Not to mention the price of research, even if its true value is very high, if it is sold, it is worth a lot of divine crystals, he does not need the corpses of these chaotic creatures, but he can give them to Tiange, which will help the development of Tiange.

But the two of them hadn't collected too many corpses of chaotic creatures, and a wolf howl came from the top of the mountain.

Then, a flash of silver light appeared.

"Be careful, that god-level silver wolf is here!"

Li Xin'er reminded.

Immediately.

A set of incomparably gorgeous battle armor, battle robes, battle boots, and battle helmets appeared on Li Xin'er's body, each of which was an origin artifact-level weapon.

With a great god-level cultivation, he can barely urge the origin artifact.

In addition, the sword in Li Xin'er's hand is also an origin artifact, and it is also a top-notch origin artifact.

At the same time, Li Xin'er also swallowed some life-saving pills.

The next moment.

The battle began.

Fully armed and blessed with many treasures, Li Xin'er barely blocked the attack of the silver wolf for a while.

Of course, she was only barely blocked, and she was still in a state of constant injury.

The gap between the two is still too big to compete with at all.

"His Highness Wanfa!"

Li Xin'er's divine sense came from the sound.

Ye Tian didn't waste time, the god-level spatial talent was unleashed, and he manipulated the spatial power to suppress the silver wolf to assist Li Xin'er.

Then, Ye Tian used the time magic power, the Spear of Time.

Once the Spear of Time has reached the Dacheng realm, it can cut off the enemy's lifespan for 3,000 years, and it can be cast ten times a day.

But now, Ye Tian had already cultivated the Spear of Time to the realm of perfection.

And with Ye Tian's current cultivation as a spear of time, he can cut off the enemy's lifespan for up to 5,000 years, and he can cast it up to twenty times a day.

In other words, Ye Tian can cut off the enemy's lifespan for a total of 100,000 years.

Although he didn't know how many years this silver wolf had to live, the loss of 100,000 years of lifespan was definitely a huge loss.

Moreover, the spear of time not only cuts off lifespan, but also vitality and status.

Once it loses its 100,000-year lifespan, this silver wolf will definitely fall into a weakened state.

"Spear of Time!"

Ye Tian activated this time magic power and aimed at the silver wolf.

The time spear was activated, and it almost didn't take time, and the silver wolf was in the middle of the battle, and he didn't care about Ye Tian at all, so he was stabbed by Ye Tian's time spear.

"Roar!!

The silver wolf roared in pain, feeling that part of the vitality in his body had disappeared, and his state was a little weaker.

Suddenly, it was furious.

Swish!

It flew towards Ye Tian, and Li Xin'er tried to intercept the silver wolf, but was knocked away by the angry silver wolf.

At this time, Ye Tian did not think about escaping, but continued to cast the spear of time and hit the silver wolf again, causing the silver wolf to lose 5,000 years of lifespan again.

"Your Highness Wanfa, run away!"

Li Xin'er's divine consciousness transmitted.

She underestimated the strength of the silver wolf, the strength of the silver wolf's body was too powerful, and the speed was too fast, it was difficult for her to hold the silver wolf.

In fact, she completely measured this silver wolf by the great god level of some first-grade Eternal Highness level in the universe, but she forgot that the great god level in the chaos could not be measured by the standards of the universe at all.

Maybe the combat power is about the same, but the difficulty is even more terrifying.

"Don't worry!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

Burst!!!

A golden light shot out from the center of the silver wolf's eyebrows, penetrating Ye Tian's body.

If it was other true god-level, it would definitely turn into ashes.

But Ye Tian's body was pierced, but there was nothing wrong with the whole person.

"Spear of Time!"

Ye Tian attacked again.

Next, no matter how the silver wolf attacked Ye Tian, it would be difficult to hurt Ye Tian.

On the contrary, Ye Tian's time spear hit the silver wolf again and again, causing the silver wolf to lose more and more lifespan, and the state of the silver wolf became weaker and weaker.

In the end, Ye Tian's twenty time spears all hit the silver wolf, causing the silver wolf to fall into a weakened state.

Li Xin'er also joined the battle group again, and after a long battle, Ye Tian and Li Xin'er still couldn't help the silver wolf.

At this time, Ye Tian suggested retreating first, and when the Spear of Time could be used again, he would come and deal with this silver wolf.

So, Ye Tian and Li Xin'er left, and the silver wolf didn't dare to attack again.

Distance.

Ye Tian and Li Xin'er stopped and rested.

"Your Highness Wanfa, why have you been attacked by that silver wolf so many times and nothing has happened?"

Li Xin'er was very puzzled.

This kind of method is not like a natural method at all, she has never seen such a natural method, it is really too rebellious.

"Secret!"

Ye Tian smiled.

In fact, it was Ye Tian who used the damage transfer talent to transfer all the damage to those death flowers in the Chaos Ancient Realm.

With the Death Flower Emperor and a large number of Death Flowers taking damage for him, he was naturally not afraid of the silver wolf.

But after this battle, many of the large number of Death Flowers that the Death Flower Emperor had managed to cultivate were already seriously injured.

Because of this, Ye Tiancai did not choose to continue fighting, but left first, after all, it was because the Time Spear needed time to recover, and those Death Flowers also needed time to recover.
